title: Checkout authentication failures after deployment
summary: Users receive repeated 401 responses from checkout-api immediately after the 2026.03.16-1 deployment.
customer_impact: Customers cannot complete checkout because authenticated sessions are rejected.
initial_signals: Alert: checkout-api authentication error rate rose from 0.5% to 38% in 5 minutes.
Support reports customer login failures during checkout.

timeline.event: Alert opened for authentication error spike on checkout-api.
Support reports multiple customer complaints about repeated 401 responses.
AUTH_ISSUER environment variable updated in the production slot.
JWT issuer mismatch errors begin appearing in checkout-api logs.
